docs.name: Multi-Step Auth Card
docs.description: Animation-first enterprise auth flow: email discovery, first-time and returning user paths, password create/login, and OTP verification with spring transitions between steps.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional Tailwind classes for the outer card container.

props.name: onStateChange
props.description: Called whenever the active auth step changes.

props.name: onSubmitEmail
props.type: (email: string) => Promise<{ exists: boolean; registered: boolean }>
props.description: If provided, drives routing after email submit; otherwise demo heuristics apply (e.g. email containing "new" or "err").

props.name: onSubmitPassword
props.description: Called on password login submit. Return false to stay on this step and show an error; any other return (including void) advances to OTP on success.

props.name: onCreatePassword
props.description: Called when saving a new password. Return false to stay on this step and show an error; otherwise advance to OTP.

props.name: onSubmitOTP
props.description: Called when the user submits a six-digit code. Return false to show an invalid-code message without leaving the step.

props.name: onResendOTP
props.description: Optional resend handler. Return false to keep the current timer and code; on throw or false, resend count is not incremented.

props.name: strings
props.description: Deep-partial overrides for all UI copy; defaults are exported as MULTI_STEP_AUTH_DEFAULT_STRINGS for reference and i18n.

props.name: otpResendCooldownSeconds
props.description: Countdown length before the resend action is available again.

props.name: otpMaxResends
props.description: Maximum resend taps before the UI locks resend.

props.name: demoEmailDelayMs
props.description: Artificial delay after email submit when onSubmitEmail is omitted (demo mode).

props.name: demoPasswordDelayMs
props.description: Artificial delay after password/OTP demo submits when the matching handler is omitted.

props.name: requireTermsConsent
props.description: When true, the initial email step shows a terms/privacy checkbox and blocks submit until it is checked. Set false to hide it.

props.name: termsUrl
props.description: URL for the 'Terms of Service' consent link.

props.name: privacyUrl
props.description: URL for the 'Privacy Policy' consent link.

docs.overview: MultiStepAuthCard is a self-contained multi-step authentication flow covering email lookup, password creation, password login, and OTP verification. Each step transitions with a smooth slide animation and all strings are overridable for i18n.

scenarios.title: Standalone sign-in page
scenarios.description: Drop in as a standalone auth card in a centred layout — the component handles all state transitions internally.

scenarios.title: Modal authentication
scenarios.description: Embed inside a dialog overlay so users can sign in without leaving the current page context.
